summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ECOMMBX Banking Application admin panel with focus on Admin Notification Bell feature and all related functionality. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend features including notification bell, ECOMMBX branding, Edit IBAN modal, Support tickets with proper labels, and Transfers Queue with rejection reasons are all functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint responding correctly
Backend: Admin login with admin@ecommbx.io successful
Backend: User login with ashleyalt003@gmail.com successful
Backend: Admin users list returns 40 users
Backend: Admin accounts list returns 29 accounts
Backend: Admin KYC pending endpoint working (0 pending)
Backend: Admin card requests endpoint working (3 requests)
Backend: Admin transfers queue endpoint working (6 pending)
Backend: Admin support tickets endpoint working (6 open)
Frontend: Admin login flow working correctly
Frontend: User login flow working correctly

Frontend: Edit IBAN modal stays open when clicking BIC input field
